_comment: Core persona (abyss) ships its <slug>.json inline with the npm package; label/description are derived by validating that file at load time. Remote personas carry an offline label/description snapshot here for the picker — self/user/language/register/emoji_policy/flourish are NOT duplicated here; they are read fresh from the actual (fetched + cached) persona-voice-card at render time, re-validated every time, so there is exactly one source of truth for what renders.

personas.label: 文言小生 · 墨渊书阁
personas.description: Literary Chinese scholar persona for meticulous engineering.

personas.label: 知性大姐姐 · 星霜雅筑
personas.description: Warm, insightful elder-sister persona for patient technical mentoring.

personas.label: 古怪精灵小师妹 · 灵犀洞天
personas.description: Hyperactive junior-sister persona with razor-sharp intuition.

personas.label: 铁壁暖阳 · 钢铁柔情
personas.description: Dependable big-brother persona that absorbs pressure and radiates warmth.

personas.label: 东北魅影·雨姐
personas.description: Sharp-tongued Northeast China code overseer. Cuts straight to the bug.
